sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَ عَلِيٌّ فِيدِيُو مُضْحِكًا عَلَى الْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Ali je na telefonu gledao smiješan video.
sentences.translationEn: Ali watched a funny video on his phone.

sentences.translation: Poslao ga je bratu da se zajedno nasmiju.
sentences.translationEn: He sent it to his brother so they could laugh together.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ الْأَخُ وَأَرْسَلَهُ إِلَى أَصْدِقَائِهِ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Brat se nasmijao i poslao ga i svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: The brother laughed and sent it to his friends as well.

sentences.arabic: انْتَشَرَ الْفِيدِيُو بَيْنَ الْجَمِيعِ فِي يَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Video se proširio među svima za jedan dan.
sentences.translationEn: The video spread among everyone in one day.
